title: Oron (disambiguation)
content:
'''Oron''' may refer to:

==Canon==
*[[Oron (lieutenant)|'''Oron''']], a [[lieutenant]] in [[Roon's military defense forces]].
*[[Oron (Resistance)|'''Oron''']], a member of the [[Resistance]].

==Legends==
*'''[[Oron Kira]]''', a [[King/Legends|King]] of [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]] in the [[Old Republic era]]
*'''[[Oron Jaeger]]''', an [[Fel Empire|Imperial]] [[General/Legends|General]] loyal to deposed Emperor [[Roan Fel]]
*'''Professor [[Oron]]''' of the [[Corva sector/Legends|Corva sector]].

{{Disambig}}
